samples.text: A knife is used to cut food. Is this expected based on common sense?
People use a knife to cut food. Does this match everyday common sense?
A blade is used to slice food. Is this expected based on common sense?
Cutting needs a sharp edge. A knife has a sharp edge, so it cuts food. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
A knife is used to cut food. Someone left the door open earlier. Is this expected based on common sense?
